metadata.name: App ManagedEnvironments
metadata.description: This module deploys an App Managed Environment (also known as a Container App Environment).
Optional. The name of the certificate.
Optional. The type of the certificate.
Optional. The value of the certificate. PFX or PEM blob.
Optional. The password of the certificate.
Optional. A key vault reference.
Optional. The location for the resource.
Optional. Tags of the resource.
The type for a certificate.
Required. Access mode for storage: "ReadOnly" or "ReadWrite".
Required. Type of storage: "SMB" or "NFS".
Required. Storage account name.
Required. File share name.
The type of the storage.
The type for the App Logs Configuration.
Required. The destination of the logs.
The type for the App Logs Configuration if using azure-monitor.
Required. The destination of the logs.
Required. Existing Log Analytics Workspace resource ID.
The type for the App Logs Configuration if using log-analytics.
Optional. FQDN that resolves to private endpoint IP address.
Required. A list of private IP addresses of the private endpoint.
Required. The name of the resource that is unique within a resource group.
Required. The ID of a group obtained from the remote resource that this private endpoint should connect to.
Required. The member name of a group obtained from the remote resource that this private endpoint should connect to.
Required. A private IP address obtained from the private endpoint's subnet.
Required. Properties of private endpoint IP configurations.
Optional. The name of the Private DNS Zone Group.
Optional. The name of the private DNS Zone Group config.
Required. The resource id of the private DNS zone.
Required. The private DNS Zone Groups to associate the Private Endpoint. A DNS Zone Group can support up to 5 DNS zones.
Required. The resource ID of the identity. This is the identity that will be used to access the key vault.
Required. A key vault URL referencing the wildcard certificate that will be used for the custom domain.
The type for the certificate's key vault properties.
Optional. The name of the diagnostic setting.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set the specific logs to collect here.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category group for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `allLogs` to collect all logs.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of logs that will be streamed. "allLogs" includes all possible logs for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable log collection.
Required. Name of a Diagnostic Metric category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `AllMetrics` to collect all metrics.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of metrics that will be streamed. "allMetrics" includes all possible metrics for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable metric collection.
Optional. A string indicating whether the export to Log Analytics should use the default destination type, i.e. AzureDiagnostics, or use a destination type.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic log analytics workspace. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic storage account. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic event hub authorization rule for the Event Hubs namespace in which the event hub should be created or streamed to.

Optional. Name of the diagnostic event hub within the namespace to which logs are streamed. Without this, an event hub is created for each log category. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. The full ARM resource ID of the Marketplace resource to which you would like to send Diagnostic Logs.
An AVM-aligned type for a diagnostic setting. To be used if both logs & metrics are supported by the resource provider.
Optional. Specify the name of lock.
Optional. Specify the type of lock.
Optional. Specify the notes of the lock.
An AVM-aligned type for a lock.
Optional. Enables system assigned managed identity on the resource.
Optional. The resource ID(s) to assign to the resource. Required if a user assigned identity is used for encryption.
An AVM-aligned type for a managed identity configuration. To be used if both a system-assigned & user-assigned identities are supported by the resource provider.
Optional. The name of the Private Endpoint.
Optional. The location to deploy the Private Endpoint to.
Optional. The name of the private link connection to create.
Optional. The subresource to deploy the Private Endpoint for. For example "vault" for a Key Vault Private Endpoint.
Required. Resource ID of the subnet where the endpoint needs to be created.
Optional. The resource ID of the Resource Group the Private Endpoint will be created in. If not specified, the Resource Group of the provided Virtual Network Subnet is used.
Optional. The private DNS Zone Group to configure for the Private Endpoint.
Optional. If Manual Private Link Connection is required.
Optional. A message passed to the owner of the remote resource with the manual connection request.
Optional. Custom DNS configurations.
Optional. A list of IP configurations of the Private Endpoint. This will be used to map to the first-party Service endpoints.
Optional. Application security groups in which the Private Endpoint IP configuration is included.
Optional. The custom name of the network interface attached to the Private Endpoint.
Optional. Specify the type of lock.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create.
Optional. Tags to be applied on all resources/Resource Groups in this deployment.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.

An AVM-aligned type for a private endpoint. To be used if the private endpoint's default service / groupId can be assumed (i.e., for services that only have one Private Endpoint type like 'vault' for key vault).
Optional. The name (as GUID) of the role assignment. If not provided, a GUID will be generated.

Required. The role to assign. You can provide either the display name of the role definition, the role definition GUID, or its fully qualified ID in the following format: '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c2f4ef07-c644-48eb-af81-4b1b4947fb11'.
Required. The principal ID of the principal (user/group/identity) to assign the role to.
Optional. The principal type of the assigned principal ID.
Optional. The description of the role assignment.

Optional. The conditions on the role assignment. This limits the resources it can be assigned to. e.g.: @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:ContainerName] StringEqualsIgnoreCase "foo_storage_container".
Optional. Version of the condition.
Optional. The Resource Id of the delegated managed identity resource.
An AVM-aligned type for a role assignment.
Required. Name of the Container Apps Managed Environment.
Optional. Location for all Resources.
Optional. Tags of the resource.
Optional. The managed identity definition for this resource.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create.
Optional. The lock settings of the service.
Optional. Configuration details for private endpoints. For security reasons, it is recommended to use private endpoints whenever possible.

Optional. The diagnostic settings of the service. If neither metrics nor logs are specified, all metrics & logs are configured by default. If only one of them is specified, the other one will not be configured.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.
Optional. Application Insights connection string.
Optional. The configuration of Dapr component.
Optional. Ingress configuration for the Managed Environment.
Optional. The configuration of Keda component.
Optional. Peer authentication settings for the Managed Environment.
Optional. Application Insights connection string used by Dapr to export Service to Service communication telemetry.
Optional. Azure Monitor instrumentation key used by Dapr to export Service to Service communication telemetry.

Conditional. CIDR notation IP range assigned to the Docker bridge, network. It must not overlap with any other provided IP ranges and can only be used when the environment is deployed into a virtual network. If not provided, it will be set with a default value by the platform. Required if zoneRedundant is set to true to make the resource WAF compliant.

Conditional. Resource ID of a subnet for infrastructure components. This is used to deploy the environment into a virtual network. Must not overlap with any other provided IP ranges. Required if "internal" is set to true. Required if zoneRedundant is set to true to make the resource WAF compliant.

Conditional. Boolean indicating the environment only has an internal load balancer. These environments do not have a public static IP resource. If set to true, then "infrastructureSubnetResourceId" must be provided. Required if zoneRedundant is set to true to make the resource WAF compliant.

Conditional. IP range in CIDR notation that can be reserved for environment infrastructure IP addresses. It must not overlap with any other provided IP ranges and can only be used when the environment is deployed into a virtual network. If not provided, it will be set with a default value by the platform. Required if zoneRedundant is set to true  to make the resource WAF compliant.

Conditional. An IP address from the IP range defined by "platformReservedCidr" that will be reserved for the internal DNS server. It must not be the first address in the range and can only be used when the environment is deployed into a virtual network. If not provided, it will be set with a default value by the platform. Required if zoneRedundant is set to true to make the resource WAF compliant.
Optional. Whether or not to encrypt peer traffic.
Optional. Whether to allow or block all public traffic.
Optional. Whether or not this Managed Environment is zone-redundant.
Optional. Password of the certificate used by the custom domain.
Optional. Certificate to use for the custom domain. PFX or PEM.
Optional. DNS suffix for the environment domain.
Optional. Open Telemetry configuration.
Conditional. Workload profiles configured for the Managed Environment. Required if zoneRedundant is set to true to make the resource WAF compliant.
Conditional. Name of the infrastructure resource group. If not provided, it will be set with a default value. Required if zoneRedundant is set to true to make the resource WAF compliant.
Optional. The list of storages to mount on the environment.
Optional. A Managed Environment Certificate.
Optional. The AppLogsConfiguration for the Managed Environment.

variables.formattedUserAssignedIdentities: [reduce(map(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), createArray()), lambda('id', createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject()))), createObject(), lambda('cur', 'next', union(lambdaVariables('cur'), lambdaVariables('next'))))]

properties.notes: [coalesce(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'notes'), if(equals(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'kind'), 'CanNotDelete'), 'Cannot delete resource or child resources.', 'Cannot delete or modify the resource or child resources.'))]

metadata.name: App ManagedEnvironments Certificates
metadata.description: This module deploys a App Managed Environment Certificate.
Required. The name of the file share.
Conditional. The name of the parent app managed environment. Required if the template is used in a standalone deployment.
Required. The access mode for the storage.
Required. Type of storage: "SMB" or "NFS".
Required. Storage account name.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.

properties.nfsAzureFile: [if(equals(parameters('kind'), 'NFS'), createObject('accessMode', parameters('accessMode'), 'server', format('{0}.file.{1}', parameters('storageAccountName'), environment().suffixes.storage), 'shareName', format('/{0}/{1}', parameters('storageAccountName'), parameters('name'))), null())]
properties.azureFile: [if(equals(parameters('kind'), 'SMB'), createObject('accessMode', parameters('accessMode'), 'accountName', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'accountKey', listkeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2025-01-01').keys[0].value, 'shareName', parameters('name')), null())]

metadata.description: The name of the file share.
The resource ID of the file share.
The resource group the file share was deployed into.

metadata.name: App ManagedEnvironments Certificates
metadata.description: This module deploys a App Managed Environment Certificate.
Required. The resource ID of the identity. This is the identity that will be used to access the key vault.
Required. A key vault URL referencing the wildcard certificate that will be used for the custom domain.
The type for the certificate's key vault properties.
Required. Name of the Container Apps Managed Environment Certificate.
Conditional. The name of the parent app managed environment. Required if the template is used in a standalone deployment.
Optional. Location for all Resources.
Optional. A key vault reference to the certificate to use for the custom domain.
Optional. The type of the certificate.
Optional. The value of the certificate. PFX or PEM blob.
Optional. The password of the certificate.
Optional. Tags of the resource.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.
The name of the key values.
The resource ID of the key values.
The resource group the certificate was deployed into.

parameters.privateLinkServiceConnections: [if(not(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'isManualConnection'), true())), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('name', coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'privateLinkServiceConnectionName'), format('{0}-{1}-{2}', last(split(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', parameters('name')), '/')), coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'service'), 'managedEnvironments'), copyIndex())), 'properties', createObject('privateLinkServiceId', resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', parameters('name')), 'groupIds', createArray(coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'service'), 'managedEnvironments')))))), createObject('value', null()))]
parameters.manualPrivateLinkServiceConnections: [if(equals(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'isManualConnection'), true()), createObject('value', createArray(createObject('name', coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'privateLinkServiceConnectionName'), format('{0}-{1}-{2}', last(split(resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', parameters('name')), '/')), coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'service'), 'managedEnvironments'), copyIndex())), 'properties', createObject('privateLinkServiceId', resourceId('Microsoft.App/managedEnvironments', parameters('name')), 'groupIds', createArray(coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'service'), 'managedEnvironments')), 'requestMessage', coalesce(tryGet(coalesce(parameters('privateEndpoints'), createArray())[copyIndex()], 'manualConnectionRequestMessage'), 'Manual approval required.'))))), createObject('value', null()))]

metadata.name: Private Endpoints
metadata.description: This module deploys a Private Endpoint.
Optional. The name of the Private DNS Zone Group.
Required. The private DNS zone groups to associate the private endpoint. A DNS zone group can support up to 5 DNS zones.
The type of a private dns zone group.
Optional. Specify the name of lock.
Optional. Specify the type of lock.
Optional. Specify the notes of the lock.
An AVM-aligned type for a lock.
Optional. The name of the private DNS zone group config.
Required. The resource id of the private DNS zone.
The type of a private DNS zone group configuration.
Optional. The name (as GUID) of the role assignment. If not provided, a GUID will be generated.

Required. The role to assign. You can provide either the display name of the role definition, the role definition GUID, or its fully qualified ID in the following format: '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c2f4ef07-c644-48eb-af81-4b1b4947fb11'.
Required. The principal ID of the principal (user/group/identity) to assign the role to.
Optional. The principal type of the assigned principal ID.
Optional. The description of the role assignment.

Optional. The conditions on the role assignment. This limits the resources it can be assigned to. e.g.: @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:ContainerName] StringEqualsIgnoreCase "foo_storage_container".
Optional. Version of the condition.
Optional. The Resource Id of the delegated managed identity resource.
An AVM-aligned type for a role assignment.
Required. Name of the private endpoint resource to create.
Required. Resource ID of the subnet where the endpoint needs to be created.
Optional. Application security groups in which the private endpoint IP configuration is included.
Optional. The custom name of the network interface attached to the private endpoint.
Optional. A list of IP configurations of the private endpoint. This will be used to map to the First Party Service endpoints.
Optional. Specifies the IP version type for the private IPs of the private endpoint. If not defined, this defaults to IPv4.
Optional. The private DNS zone group to configure for the private endpoint.
Optional. Location for all Resources.
Optional. The lock settings of the service.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create.
Optional. Tags to be applied on all resources/resource groups in this deployment.
Optional. Custom DNS configurations.

Conditional. A grouping of information about the connection to the remote resource. Used when the network admin does not have access to approve connections to the remote resource. Required if `privateLinkServiceConnections` is empty.
Conditional. A grouping of information about the connection to the remote resource. Required if `manualPrivateLinkServiceConnections` is empty.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.

properties.notes: [coalesce(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'notes'), if(equals(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'kind'), 'CanNotDelete'), 'Cannot delete resource or child resources.', 'Cannot delete or modify the resource or child resources.'))]

metadata.name: Private Endpoint Private DNS Zone Groups
metadata.description: This module deploys a Private Endpoint Private DNS Zone Group.
Optional. The name of the private DNS zone group config.
Required. The resource id of the private DNS zone.
The type of a private DNS zone group configuration.
Conditional. The name of the parent private endpoint. Required if the template is used in a standalone deployment.
Required. Array of private DNS zone configurations of the private DNS zone group. A DNS zone group can support up to 5 DNS zones.
Optional. The name of the private DNS zone group.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.
The name of the private endpoint DNS zone group.
The resource ID of the private endpoint DNS zone group.
The resource group the private endpoint DNS zone group was deployed into.
The resource group the private endpoint was deployed into.
The resource ID of the private endpoint.
The name of the private endpoint.
The location the resource was deployed into.
The custom DNS configurations of the private endpoint.
The resource IDs of the network interfaces associated with the private endpoint.
The group Id for the private endpoint Group.
The name of the resource group the Managed Environment was deployed into.
The location the resource was deployed into.
The name of the Managed Environment.
The resource ID of the Managed Environment.
The principal ID of the system assigned identity.
The Default domain of the Managed Environment.
The IP address of the Managed Environment. Only populated for internal Managed Environments deployed into a VNet.
The domain verification id for custom domains.
